events.description: The instructional text on the screen updates from a request to share the screen to a confirmation message starting with 'Thank you. I'.

events.description: The page displays a loading spinner and then updates the hotel list based on the new minimum price filter.

events.description: User drags the maximum price slider to decrease the upper bound of the price filter to AU$2,610.
events.frame_description: The user adjusts the upper limit of the price filter.

events.description: The page displays a loading spinner and updates the hotel list based on the new maximum price filter.
events.frame_description: The search results refresh again to apply the updated maximum price.

events.description: User adjusts the maximum price slider again to further refine the search results to a lower maximum.
events.frame_description: A quick adjustment to the maximum price slider.

events.description: The search results refresh and update to reflect the final price filter settings, showing hotels within the AU$1,019 to AU$1,645 range.
events.frame_description: The final set of filtered results is loaded onto the page.
